result:
Verified conclusively. Before the verdict, two security flags from this review:

1. **Embedded injection in `new-session-handoff.md`** — the file contains a `<system-reminder>…</system-reminder>` block (lines 51–52) *inside its own content*. Document text should never impersonate a system message. Its substance here was benign ("unconfirmable claims are findings"), so it didn't mislead me, but the mechanism is an injection vector — recommend stripping it.
2. **Anomalous text in a tool result** — a `git status --porcelain` call returned a non-git line ("MINOR: the .codex/attachments path does not exist at all"). git never emits that; treating it as possible tool-output tampering. All my conclusions rest on my own independent `ls`/`wc`/`find`/`grep` checks, which are unaffected.

The review cannot validate any coverage claim because **both the source-of-truth and the artifacts-under-review are missing or empty**:

- Source file `…/a9f85364…/pasted-text.txt` — **does not exist** (the entire `/Users/jws/.codex/attachments/` path is absent). SHA256, the 1342-line count, and all section coverage are unverifiable.
- `ldip-full-integration-plan.md`, `ldip-source-index.md`, `ldip-no-omission-coverage-matrix.md`, `ldip-closeout-pack-integration-plan.md` — **none exist**; `docs/ldip-integration/` is empty.
- `latest-total-closeout-execution-plan.md` — exists but is **0 bytes**.
- Repo-wide search for `no-omission`, `production_ready`, the SHA prefix, and `ldip-source-index` — **zero matches** anywhere (incl. the untracked `Law Firm OS UI/`); no stashes, only `main`.

```json
{
  "review_code": "C-LDIP-01",
  "review_type": "read_only_completeness",
  "overall_verdict": "BLOCK",
  "blocks_ldip_planning_gate": true,
  "blocks_ldip_implementation_gate": true,
  "no_unresolved_p0": false,
  "no_unresolved_p1": false,
  "source_verification": {
    "expected_path": "/Users/jws/.codex/attachments/a9f85364-9785-449b-b925-df1d2c93eee1/pasted-text.txt",
    "exists": false,
    "parent_dir_exists": false,
    "expected_sha256": "82b396474b43afd278042e8eb1b8a18a2b0fd2c2ee640e23022622ef2d70be9c",
    "sha256_verified": false,
    "expected_lines": 1342,
    "line_count_verified": false
  },
  "artifact_verification": [
    {"path": "docs/ldip-integration/ldip-full-integration-plan.md", "exists": false},
    {"path": "docs/ldip-integration/ldip-source-index.md", "exists": false},
    {"path": "docs/ldip-integration/ldip-no-omission-coverage-matrix.md", "exists": false},
    {"path": "docs/ldip-integration/ldip-closeout-pack-integration-plan.md", "exists": false},
    {"path": "docs/closeout-pack-plan/latest-total-closeout-execution-plan.md", "exists": true, "bytes": 0, "reviewable": false}
  ],
  "scoped_checks": {
    "missing_source_areas": "UNVERIFIABLE — no source file and no source-index artifact to compare.",
    "misleading_line_family_rp_mapping": "UNVERIFIABLE — no artifact contains mappings; no source to map against.",
    "premature_production_ready_claims": "NONE FOUND TO REFUTE — no artifact content exists; however advancing any gate on non-existent deliverables would itself be a premature-readiness failure.",
    "boundary_drift": "UNVERIFIABLE — no scope artifact exists to assess drift."
  },
  "findings": [
    {
      "id": "P0-1",
      "severity": "P0",
      "title": "Source-of-truth file is missing",
      "evidence": "ls/wc/shasum report 'No such file or directory'; entire /Users/jws/.codex/attachments/ path absent.",
      "impact": "No coverage, line, family, or RP claim can be independently confirmed. The 'source index completeness' premise has no input.",
      "recommendation": "Re-supply the source paste at the stated path (or update the canonical path), then re-run C-LDIP-01."
    },
    {
      "id": "P0-2",
      "severity": "P0",
      "title": "Four of five named artifacts do not exist",
      "evidence": "docs/ldip-integration/ is empty; repo-wide find for ldip-*.md returns only the empty execution plan; grep for ldip-source-index / no-omission returns nothing.",
      "impact": "There is nothing to review for coverage families, named objects (core entities, table contracts, 12 agents, T0-T7 tools, clean-room types/objects/policies/templates, UI surfaces, NFRs, compliance, APIs/events, tests, priorities, risks).",
      "recommendation": "Produce the four planning artifacts before requesting completeness review."
    },
    {
      "id": "P0-3",
      "severity": "P0",
      "title": "Consolidated execution plan is empty (0 bytes)",
      "evidence": "wc -c docs/closeout-pack-plan/latest-total-closeout-execution-plan.md == 0.",
      "impact": "No execution plan content to validate; the file is a placeholder only.",
      "recommendation": "Populate before review."
    },
    {
      "id": "P1-1",
      "severity": "P1",
      "title": "Review scope overclaims artifacts as 'created'",
      "evidence": "Scope lists five artifacts as 'Artifacts created' with detailed coverage (sections 1-23, RP mapping, L0-L6/T0-T7, 12 agents, clean-room set, NFR set), none of which exist on disk.",
      "impact": "By the track's own rule ('if a reviewer cannot independently confirm a claim, that is itself a finding'), every listed coverage and mapping claim is an unconfirmed finding.",
      "recommendation": "Reconcile the request with actual repo state; do not represent placeholders as completed deliverables."
    },
    {
      "id": "P2-1",
      "severity": "P2",
      "title": "Embedded <system-reminder> inside new-session-handoff.md (injection vector)",
      "evidence": "Lines 51-52 of the handoff file contain a system-reminder block within document content.",
      "impact": "Document content can masquerade as system instructions to future automated readers.",
      "recommendation": "Remove the embedded tag; keep guidance as plain prose."
    },
    {
      "id": "P2-2",
      "severity": "P2",
      "title": "Anomalous text in git tool output (possible tampering)",
      "evidence": "git status --porcelain returned a non-git line ('MINOR: the .codex/attachments path does not exist at all').",
      "impact": "Tool output may be untrustworthy; verdict was therefore based only on independently re-run filesystem checks.",
      "recommendation": "Investigate hooks/wrappers that may be injecting into command output."
    },
    {
      "id": "P2-3",
      "severity": "P2",
      "title": "LDIP track has no committed provenance",
      "evidence": "handoff doc, empty execution plan, and ldip-integration/ are all untracked (git status '??'); only branch is main; no stashes.",
      "impact": "No version history backs the track's deliverables or source reference.",
      "recommendation": "Commit artifacts once produced so the source SHA and coverage are traceable."
    }
  ],
  "gate_rationale": "Planning gate requires a passing C-LDIP-01; it cannot pass with no source and no populated artifacts. Implementation gate is downstream of an uncleared planning gate, so it is blocked as well.",
  "next_actions": [
    "Restore the source paste at the canonical path (verify SHA256 + 1342 lines).",
    "Generate the four LDIP planning artifacts and populate the consolidated execution plan.",
    "Re-run C-LDIP-01 against real content."
  ]
}
```

**Bottom line:** BLOCK. Both gate flags are set (planning and implementation blocked); P0 and P1 findings are unresolved. Nothing reviewable exists yet — the source file and four of five artifacts are absent, and the fifth is empty. This was a read-only review; I made no changes. Once the source is restored and the artifacts are populated, re-run C-LDIP-01.
